description: Sector overlay for banks, specialised deposit-taking institutions, payment service providers, electronic money issuers, fintech platforms, lenders, and financial technology documentation in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Banking and Fintech. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Banks and Specialised Deposit-Taking Institutions Act, 2016 (Act 930)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Bank of Ghana

primary_sources.name: Payment Systems and Services Act, 2019 (Act 987)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Bank of Ghana

primary_sources.name: Securities Industry Act, 2016 (Act 929)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Securities and Exchange Commission Ghana

primary_sources.name: Anti-Money Laundering Act, 2020 (Act 1044)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Financial Intelligence Centre

primary_sources.name: Data Protection Act, 2012 (Act 843)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Data Protection Commission

rules.title: Bank of Ghana licence, authorization, or regulated-status evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Bank of Ghana licence, specialised deposit-taking authorization, payment service licence, electronic-money issuer licence, or regulated status evidence.

required_signals: authorised by the Bank of Ghana

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Customer due diligence and KYC evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for customer identification, verification, due diligence, beneficial ownership, transaction monitoring, or suspicious transaction evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Payment-service technology, security, or control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for payment system security, fraud monitoring, cyber-security policy, authorization controls, certification, or interoperability evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Financial consumer protection and complaint-redress evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for fair treatment, transparent fees, complaints handling, redress, customer rights, or responsible conduct evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Customer financial-data privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for customer privacy, personal data, financial information, transaction data, or data-protection evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
